title: SCP-860
description: 860-1 dimention, 860-2, some new items and villagers profession
body:
Hello everyone! Its my first mod. Here I'm going to tell you about this mod.

To make this mod work, you need to install GeckoLib mod, because my mod use animations: (https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)

 

It's 860 mod, that adds:

1) scp computer. It's the profession block for the villager, who will sell you all the scps.
![new scp computer profession block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eba6d5626ca242e2e87e6da88e4c4eba51a50be8_0.webp)![scp computer craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ff8c5e647ae3b3ba2c0752ab27ca3450dbf9b37_0.webp)    
![new villager's profession](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/206d754157e85526233855ac4ff1e90ea4edf5bf_0.webp)![new villager trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/726d3c302dad6a0d1391dcf0c21a4f51fde95206_0.webp)
  
  
  

 
2) SCP-714 - ring. No functionality, needed just for trades.                                        
![SCP-714 ring model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03a38f746d1fb56c5d0ebec3d6b6246a711f1c5a_0.webp)
  
  
  
  
  
  
  
3) SCP-500-1 - pill. If you eat it, it will give you extra hearts and regeneration effect for 1 minute.                                                                                        
![SCP-500-1 pill model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7752a34d790005ff350b822d34a9ed71bbaf67fd_0.webp)                                                                                                                                                           
                            ![extra hp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2371cc845c19e2e55b64d462068d27bd63d21451.png)
  
  
  
  
  
  
  
4) SCP-207 - Cola with caffeine. If you drink it, it will give you speed boost for 1 minute.
![SCP-207 cola model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2218327afe24e6208593fd9ccb97b1bf1507902c_0.webp)
  
  
  
  
  
  
5) SCP 860 - blue key. If you sneak and rmb click on the door you will teleport to 860-1 dimention.                                                            
![SCP-860 key model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f323838bdc659bbc8820d79bf153eab145decea9_0.webp)
![860-1 dimention forest biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1086d6fb4a0f563db29dfe41effb4c1ac89bd18_0.webp)
  
  
  
  
  
  
  
6) SCP-860-2 - cat that spawns in 50 blocks when you enter 860-1 dimention. It acts like vanilla minecraft dog, you can pet it (feed it with "860 food" that sells villager-scientist). You can make it laying down by rmb clicking on it. Please be kind with it  :)                    

![SCP-860-2 big cat normal pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47308d8fef885380d8b1fa98f1911dd3ee1bcce3_0.webp)
![SCP-860-2 cat sleeping pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae735f103fb7ede9e06adb926acf7a37185419c0_0.webp)
